notes: Sub 21 + Beta-Bernoulli posterior on the K=5 labeled examples (per subject). Uses K as a likelihood update, not an additive residual shift (which sub 8/14/20 showed is too noisy). Prior strength N_PRIOR=25 gives K=5 a weight of ~17% when present. When no labels match a test subject, this collapses exactly to sub 21's prediction (so worst-case ties sub 21 at -0.61). Same artifacts as sub 21.
